name: Sun Loan Company
description_short: Sun Loan Company offers personal installment loans ($101.59–$1,700 in Texas) with same-day funding, plus tax preparation services at physical locations across multiple states.
description_long:
Sun Loan Company has operated for over 30 years as a community-based personal lender with physical branch locations across Alabama, Illinois, Missouri, New Mexico, Oklahoma, Tennessee, and Texas. The San Antonio branch is located in Las Palmas Shopping Center at 803 Castroville Road and operates Monday–Saturday with extended hours on Fridays and select Saturdays.

The company offers personal installment loans available both online and in-person, with loan amounts ranging from $101.59 to $1,700 in Texas. Beyond lending, they provide tax preparation services (including refund advances up to $7,000 for early filers), document copying, and fax services. They explicitly market loans for debt consolidation, home improvements, medical expenses, major purchases, and emergency expenses. The application process is designed to be fast, with potential same-day funding via branch pickup or bank deposit.

Sun Loan distinguishes itself through a stated willingness to look beyond credit scores alone during underwriting, positioning themselves as an alternative to traditional lenders. They emphasize fast customer service and employ Spanish-speaking staff ("Ofrecemos servicios en español"). Their website features customer testimonials praising staff professionalism and speed of service. They also offer online payment options and educational resources on personal finance basics.

As a traditional personal loan lender with small loan caps ($1,700 maximum in Texas), Sun Loan serves customers needing emergency or short-term funds but does not disclose APR, fees, or repayment terms on their website. The loan amounts are modest, making this suitable for minor emergencies rather than substantial consolidation needs. Customers should verify current rates and terms directly, as this information is not publicly available on their site.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Same-day funding available through in-person pickup or bank deposit
Loan application does not affect credit score (pre-qualification only)
Considers factors beyond credit score during underwriting
Bilingual staff and Spanish-language services available
Multiple funding uses: debt consolidation, home improvement, medical, emergency expenses
Tax preparation with refund advances up to $7,000 available
Extended branch hours including Saturday service (select Saturdays)
cons: Maximum loan amount of $1,700 in Texas is quite limited for major expenses
No APR, interest rates, or fee schedules disclosed on website
No online loan repayment terms or comparison tools provided
Limited to specific states; not nationwide coverage
Customer reviews are only positive (no negative feedback visible), suggesting curated testimonials
best_for: Customers needing small emergency loans ($500–$1,500) with fast approval
Texas residents seeking same-day or next-day funding via in-person service
Individuals with non-prime credit seeking lenders who evaluate beyond credit scores
Tax filers eligible for refund advances who want integrated loan and tax services
diagnosis: Sun Loan is best for customers in Texas and other covered states who need small emergency loans under $1,700 with same-day funding and don't mind visiting a physical location. The primary caveat is the lack of publicly disclosed rate and fee information, which makes it impossible to assess affordability without direct contact; borrowers should compare terms with other lenders before committing.
services: Auto repair and auto club services
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 803 Castroville Rd Ste 129, San Antonio, TX 78237
